accommodations.text: Use the personal FM/DM listening system in every class.
accommodations.source_quote: Use the personal FM/DM listening system in every class.

accommodations.text: Provide access to a reduced-distraction workspace.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide access to a reduced-distraction workspace.

accommodations.text: Repeat and rephrase spoken directions on request.
accommodations.source_quote: Repeat and rephrase spoken directions on request.

accommodations.text: Seat near the point of instruction and away from high-traffic areas.
accommodations.source_quote: Seat near the point of instruction and away from high-traffic areas.

accommodations.text: Provide visual supports and models for new tasks.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide visual supports and models for new tasks.

accommodations.text: Allow a four-function calculator on non-calculation-skill tasks.
accommodations.source_quote: Allow a four-function calculator on non-calculation-skill tasks.

services.provider_role: Teacher of the deaf and hard of hearing
services.source_quote: Deaf/hard-of-hearing itinerant support: 60 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Teacher of the deaf and hard of hearing.
Specialized academic instruction: 100 minutes per week; 50 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Special education teacher.
Individual counseling: 30 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 1 time weekly; provider: School counselor.

goals.text: Grace will accept a change in routine using a coping strategy in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Accepts a change in routine in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Grace will accept a change in routine using a coping strategy in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Noah will sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Sustains attention for 3 minutes in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Noah will sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Priya will follow two-step spoken directions in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Follows two-step directions in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Priya will follow two-step spoken directions in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Organizes a response without an outline in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
